observations: Generated speech did not match the Hindi targets.
Some samples contained short speech followed by silence.
The English control sample was intelligible.
The complete target sentences were not understandable.
No reliable perceptual difference was identified compared with the 100-step model.
The target sentences remained largely unintelligible.

conclusion: The decreasing validation loss shows that the adapter learned from the Hindi dataset, but the improvement did not translate into a clear perceptual intelligibility gain between the 100-step and 500-step checkpoints.
